name: zendesk-mcp
description: Read/write MCP server for Zendesk: tickets, comments, views, macros, users, groups, organizations, and time tracking.
long_description:
A Model Context Protocol server that exposes Zendesk ticket read and write tools to Claude Desktop and other MCP clients. Search, list, and fetch tickets, comments, and attachments; create new tickets and update existing fields including group, custom status, and tags; post public replies and internal notes; set ticket status and assign agents; browse and apply views and macros; look up users, groups, organizations, and custom statuses; read and write time-tracking entries; format a ticket as a Markdown issue draft for handoff to GitLab, GitHub, or Jira. Optional Help Center knowledge base resource and optional Git-Zen integration for linked GitLab issues, MRs, and commits.

Before first use, run `uvx zendesk-mcp setup` in a terminal to complete the Zendesk OAuth handshake.
